summary: Tested Process Flow PDF page and @ethara.ai signup restriction. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical features working - PDF loads and renders, sidebar navigation works, bookmark/notes functional, signup restriction blocks non-ethara emails. One minor UI issue: error toast shows generic message instead of API response on registration rejection.

ui_bugs.issue: When registration is rejected (non @ethara.ai email), toast shows 'Failed to connect to server' instead of the actual API error message 'Registration is restricted to Ethara AI employees only'

passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint
Backend: Register with non @ethara.ai email rejected (400)
Backend: Register with @ethara.ai email accepted (200)
Backend: PDF endpoint without token returns 401
Backend: PDF endpoint with invalid token returns 401
Backend: PDF endpoint with valid token returns 200 with PDF content
Backend: PDF endpoint for nonexistent doc returns 404
Backend: PDF headers prevent caching
Backend: PDF has content-disposition header
Backend: Login with invalid credentials rejected (401)
Backend: Login with nonexistent user rejected (401)
Frontend: Sidebar Operations category expandable
Frontend: Process Flow link navigates to /process-flow
Frontend: Process Flow page title displays correctly
Frontend: PDF canvas renders successfully
Frontend: Page navigation controls (Previous/Next/Page input) present
Frontend: Bookmark button saves and shows 'Page 1' state
Frontend: Notes panel toggle works
Frontend: Add note functionality works
Frontend: Bookmark delete works
Frontend: Right-click (context menu) is prevented on PDF viewer
Frontend: User-select: none applied to PDF container
Frontend: Registration blocked for non @ethara.ai emails (stays on page)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix Register.js error handling to show actual API error message instead of generic 'Failed to connect to server'
critical_code_review_comments: ProcessFlowPage.js properly implements PDF viewing with bookmark and notes features
Context menu prevention and user-select: none correctly applied
Backend ALLOWED_EMAIL_DOMAINS check at line 207-217 working correctly
INTERNAL_DOCS dictionary correctly maps 'process-flow' to PDF URL
seed_data_creation: Created test users with @ethara.ai email for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Process Flow page and signup restriction fully tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_process_flow_signup.py covers all API endpoints. Frontend data-testid attributes for Process Flow page: process-flow-page-title, process-flow-bookmark-button, process-flow-notes-toggle, process-flow-notes-panel, process-flow-new-note-input, process-flow-add-note-button, process-flow-prev-page, process-flow-next-page, process-flow-page-input, process-flow-link (in sidebar). Minor issue: Register.js shows generic error instead of API error message.

process_flow_page.pdf_loads: ✓ PDF renders via canvas using PDF.js
process_flow_page.page_navigation: ✓ Previous/Next buttons and page input work
process_flow_page.notes_add: ✓ Notes can be added with page prefix
process_flow_page.right_click_disabled: ✓ Context menu prevented on PDF viewer

signup_restriction.frontend_blocks: ✓ User stays on register page when rejected
